description.value: Your work emphasizes the skilled manual dexterity and attention to detail required to create beautiful works of artistry. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Specialty Crafting] feat of your choice. Additionally, your background in artistry has left you with a keen eye for aesthetics that can often make your work more valuable to collectors. When you roll a critical success on Crafting to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Earn Income], you gain the amount of currency listed for the task level + 2 and your proficiency rank.
